message.content:
{
  "decision": "Use `BenchmarkContext` as immutable configuration container with `Repository`, `Model`, and `Constraints` as required fields; scoring uses finite-value average with fallback to 0.",
  "constraint": "Only one heavy model server runs at a time; fixed model paths; all experiments containerized via memory-safe Docker; logs are reproducible; watchdog timeouts enforced.",
  "risk": "Model server overload or Docker resource exhaustion if constraints are violated; non-finite values in scores may mask data issues (fallback to 0 could hide errors).",
  "nextSteps": [
    "Validate input constraints are syntactically and semantically correct before launch.",
    "Implement metric logging for non-finite values to detect data anomalies.",
    "Integrate Docker resource monitoring (memory/CPU) to preempt timeouts.",
    "Build test harness to simulate constraint violations and watchdog triggers."
  ]
}
